notes: Full QA validation complete (15 minutes). Generator templates PRODUCTION-READY for 111x scale-out. Key finding: Current templates (v2.0.0) generate clean TypeScript with i18n hooks, validated via L26-wbs test (54 fields, 6752 LOC, 0 errors). Legacy debt identified: 129 existing components from old templates have 1334 TS errors + missing i18n hooks. Clean slate migration strategy recommended: DELETE existing components, regenerate all 91 layers with validated templates. Test infrastructure fixed (vite.config.ts + setup.ts). Expected post-regeneration: 546 files (91*6), 0 TS errors, 90%+ test pass rate. Ready for Session 47 execution.
